titleStmt.title: SII 18.136: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 136. (B.K. No. 104 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HĀVĒRI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Two pieces of a slab in the Kallumaṇḍapa.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Sarvajña-chakravarti Bhūlōkamalladē[va] is dated in the 8th year of his reign, Ānanda, Pushya Śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. The date is irregular. The tithi cited corresponds to A.D. 1134, December 22, which was a Saturday. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on the following Tuesday.

The record, which gives a glowing account of the agrahāra Pāvari, the tank ituated therein and the Mahājanas of that place, seems to state that the village was made into an agrahāra, during the reign of Āhavamalla. It further states that, at the request of Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Manevergaḍe and Piriya-Daṇḍanāyaka Kumāra-Padmanābharasa, the governor of Banavāsi, to repair the tank and revive its grant which had lapsed, Mallikārjuna of the Kadamba family got it repaired, after worshipping the Four-hundred Mahājanas. The donor is stated to be governing Sattaḷige Thousand, Pānuṁgal Five-hundred and other divisions. An earlier grant made in S11aka 989, Plavaṅga, seems to be mentioned in lines 18-19.
The record is badly damaged. It is stated to have been composed by Kiriya Mūkaṇa-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai śaṁbhavē . namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khu ©
rāṁtaragatō yasya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇāyatē kṣapāṁsabhṛdarāna
mranamarādhīśacūḍāratna dēvō ttamar . dharaṇī
saṁstutapa māna mānavyastutaṁ harītanavanī
khyātaṁ suta vikramādya caḷukya pābdhimudritōrvvītaḷavistārarccāḷu
kyaroḷariḷāramaṇaranēkabhū vibhu vikramaṁ tadanujaṁ
saṁdayyaṇaṁ taṁnṛpāḷana tammaṁ rvvīśvaraṁ . tadanuja . vṛttha
māḷavamēghacāḷapavanaṁ magadhāvanīpā golla nṛpēṇayūtha
sārddūḷa nūrjjitaya gaṇyanurvvīnuta
hariharapaṁkējajātāṁghṛpadmā nanupamaṁ rājasarvvajñabhū
paṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīp® cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matsarvvajñacakravartti bhūlōkamalladē ttamire . v® . nega
rddirddāhavamallavallabha janōpakārakaraṇavyā
pārapārāyaṇaṁ ja tha caḷukyāvanīśaniḷāma
ṇḍaḷaratnadīpanasuh® nagrahāramanidaṁ sad
brahmaniṣṭhāparaṁ . © svasti mayyaṁgaḷu banavase pannircchā
sirakkaṁ śirōmaṇiya mumagādhagaṁbhīra jaḷanidhi
yumenippa vikhyāti maṁ sakavarṣada 989 neya
plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha kaṁ māḍi biṭṭu saṁda
© v® . rājikadiṁdamanta ttanoḷu
guṇabhrājitanaṣpa tailanṛpa virōdhima nikarakke
davatkariyūthamahā kṣmā bhava
nakhi rājaśiḷīmukha
gaḷuṁ palarppogaḷe svā
dhṛti
worn out
lakṣmīniḷayaṁ pratāpa
maṁ nṛpa mallikārjjunaṁ . bedaṟadarā
maṇḍaḷikarānatarāgada vairibhūparārkkadana
nōḷpaḍaṁkanakamayapurōpavanadoḷpuramunnata
makramanirīkṣaṇadiṁ sadayāvaḷōka samasta pra
sattaḷigesāyiramumaṁ pānuṁgalla ynūṟumaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhi
. ka . © tatpādapadmasēvōdyatpaṭu vidviṣṭa duṣṭadaṇḍāṁśamahi nabhīmaba
. dṛḍhavipuḷasthairyyamaṁ ghāṭanadaṇḍaṁ tuṁgagabhīrate vasu ṟaṇḍaḷaṁ biṇpi
yyenipudyacchauryyamantāḷdidanatuḷa yaśōlābhanī padmanābha . ghanavāṁcchānvite kaḷpabhūja
ramanuṇḍumēṇbeḷe cintāmaṇi grāmamaṇḍanamaṁ kaṭṭidano pēḷāścaryamaudāryya meṁbina
kṣmīsadmanaṁ padmanaṁ . kaṁ . sēnāni tāne tsēnādhīśaṁ kumāra padmarasaṁ yuddhānēkavidviṣaḍba ḷadānavadānavaripupra bhāvākhyāna .
śastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati maneverggaḍe piriyadaṇḍanāyaka kumāra padmanābharasarssarvvādhikāra sā rasaṁ
yaṁ banavasenāḍanāḷdanubhavisuttirddaṁ . v® . Amitadvīpābdhi vēḷāvaḷayita vasudhābhāgadoḷ kuntaḷaṁ viśvamahīsaṁsēvyamā kuntaḷadharaṇigaḷaṁ
kāramī teṁkanāḍalli manōjñaṁ khyātamavyāhatamenisi sarassēvyanīrējanānākamanīyōdyānadiṁdaṁ banavase vasudhābhāminīramyaharmmyaṁ . ka . bana
vasenāḍadu kaṁdarppana jananāgāramaduve ratige manōnandanameṁdoḍoḷupa ninnāvano pogaḷalu neṟavanadaṟa mahimōnnatiyaṁ . © Ānāḍoḷagrahā
raṁ bhūnārīkucataṭāgrahāraṁ vimaḷaśrīniḷayaṁ sadvidyāsthānaṁ pāvari nirantaraṁ ranjisuguṁ . puruhūtana puradoḷ maccarisuvudidu bhōgavatiya bhōga
manuṟe mānkaripudu kubēranaḷakāpuradaḷakamanaḍasi piḍidu koydudu celviṁ . kaṁ . Eḷemāviṁdabjaṣaṇḍaṁgaḷinaḷikuḷajhaṁkāradiṁ sārapuṁskōkiḷamaṁdrārava
diṁ pūṁbaḷeya sovaḷiniṁ sutti sarvvarttukōdyatphaḷamaṁ tāḷdirdda pūgivanadi neleya tōṁṭaṁgaḷiṁ kāytateṁgiṁ phaḷamaṁ pēṟirdda raṁbhāvanadineseva vudyāna lakṣmīnivāsa .
© mūgu mogakke caṁdanasugandhacayaṁ niṭiḷakke ratnabhūṣāgamakaṁ koraluge kivi goppuva muttina karṇnapūradaṁtāgaḷumoppuguṁ negardda pāvari tāṁ banavāsenāḷge
vaḍḍāgarameṁdoḍunnatiyanārppogaḷarvvasudhātaḷāgradoḷ . tadvijōttamara guṇa gaṇaprabhāvameṁteṁdoḍe . v® . kavitāsūktisudhārasakke kaḷaśaṁ satyakke gottā
tmatatvavidarggirkke sudharmmadhēnunivahadāḍuṁbolaṁ brāhmāṁḍōdbhavamabjākṣamatakke kaṇdeṟavi tāṁ varṇnāśramācāravaibhavaśūrarenisirddarccatuśśatadharā
dēvarddharācakradoḷ . palaruṁ jīyembinaṁ dēgulake keṟege satrakke śāstrakke viprāvaḷigiṣṭaṁgāś®tagartthige maduvegēṁ tāvittu puṇyādhikarkkēvaḷamurvvībhā
gadoḷ tammaya jasameseyalu vipravaṁśōttama kalikālātaṁkamaṁ tūḷdidaranu pamitaudāryyadiṁ tadvijar . jaḷajākṣaṁ śrīyanutsāhade ku
ḍe paḍedarppāṇḍura jaḷamaṁ hastōdakammāḍida yaṁ mitra putraṁ sale koṭṭaṁ kalpavṛkṣaṁgaḷumanupamitaudāryyamaṁ janmabhū
misthaḷameṁdā mahīkhyātavatyaṁta pāvana sarvvadānasamupārjjitaradhyayanaprabhāvasaṁ bhāvitarānuṣaṁgikaphaḷapravi
rājitasaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanaśarīrarapākṛtadharmmasādhva tmarenippa pāvariya viprajanaṁ kṛtakṛtyarādarō . kaṁ . vikaikapaṇḍitarllakṣmīkararapra
tihatapratāparssaraṇānīkajanavajrapaṁjara rbbhavāṁghṛ pūjōtsava vinōdarilli sujanōttamarilli suśabdaśāstrasaṁcā ḷaka tatva
marēśvara vidyōdayarilli susaumyarūpa padakarilli sallalitakīrtigaḷilliya viprarellaruṁ . vacana . Intu nālnūrvvaru
mamaḷaprakhyātiyi tadgrāmada dakṣiṇadiśābhāgadoḷuditōditabakabaḷāka cakravākakuravaplakṣavikṣiptakaṁjalkapuṁjapiṁjaritōrmmimāḷāviḷāsamu
dru kamaḷākṣaka ryyanivāsamumamṛta kaḷita praviluṭhatpāṭhīnapradyōtaluḷitamṛgāṁkakusumasauganda
ndhurapradēśamaṁ sakaḷajaḷacaranicayanicitasaṁjīvanāvāsamumāgi nētraśōbhā viḷāsamantāḷdi . kaṁ . nallahaḷageṟe samastajanōllasitaphaḷapradāyikā nandana
midu vārāśiyadilliye nelasittenipu . v® . dhāma miral mrigayānimittadiṁ parida dī cakri naḷa nīkṣisi māḷpa
ramanerivoysaladu pāvariyeṁbabhidhānadi dēśāgarakeṟeyeṁbudoṁdu pesari śvadhātriyoḷ . Intu pārāvāramaṁ maccaripudu surasindhu pravāha
prabhāsaṁpadamaṁ dōṟuguṁ śvacchateyinatuḷagāṁbhīryyadiṁdatyagādhaṁ vudidopputippududyatkarimakarakarōdagrapāṭhīnaśōbhāspadavīcirōca
yiṁ pāvariya baḷiya saṁpūrṇnasaduttaḍāga . tti pariva parinīraṁ budhi tere masagittenipa parikāliṁdaṁ kaṁbukadaḷīsuradrumajaṁbīrabījapūgavanavi
vu beḷaguṁ . vacana . © Iṁtu mahanīyamahimeyaṁ tāḷdida śrīmannallahaḷageṟeyaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ piriya daṇḍanāyakaṁ kumāra padmanābharasarddharmma
prasaṁgāyātaṁ banavāśidēśaśirōmaṇiyuma(ṁ)vināśisthānamī keṟeyo kaṭṭisi ṟege muṁnna naḍava taḷabhōgada dharmmaṁ keṭṭirddappudadaṁ punarū
rjjitamāge naḍeyisaluvēḷkumeṁdu binnapaṁgeyyalu śrīmadvīrakādaṁba mallikārjjunadēvaṁ svasti śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōkamallavarṣada 8 neyānanda saṁvatsarada pu
ṣya śuddha 5 sōmavāramumuttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa vyātīpāta kūḍida puṇya tithiyoḷ yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇa
japasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannaru . vibudhaprasannaruṁ . yajanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadāna pratigrahapraṇūtaṣaṭkarmmanirataruṁ . manumunīṁdracaritaru (.)
manēkatarkkavyākaraṇapurāṇakāvyanāṭakabharatavātsyāyanādividyāsārāsāravicāracāru caturānanaruṁ . paravādikuṁbhikuṁbhasthaḷavidāraṇapracaṇḍapaṁcā
nanaruṁ . sakaḷadiyantaravyāptasudhādhavaḷadīdhitipravarttitakīrttigaḷu (.) magaṇyapuṇya mūrttigaḷuṁ . nyāyavaiśēṣikalōkāyatasāṁkhyabauddhārhatamīmāṁsa
kaprabaḷaṣaḍdarśanasarōvaravirājitarājahaṁsaruṁ bhāratīkarṇnāvataṁsaruṁ . nayavinaya satyaśaucācāracārucāritraruṁ saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhana
pavitrīkṛtagātraruṁ . sarvvātithyabhyāgatapūjāgragaṇyaruṁ svīkṛtapuṇyaruṁ . sakaḷa vēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgāṣṭādaśasmṛtipurāṇānēkadharmmaśāstrabhūbhṛtkṛḍākuṁja raruṁ .
śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ . sukarasukavipikanikarasaphaḷasahakārārāmaruṁ . vidvajjana prēmaruṁ . banavāsidēśalalāṭatiḷakarum hariharahiraṇyaga
rbhakramakamaḷayamaḷapūjānandapuḷakaruṁ . nānādeśe gōbrāhmaṇāklōśaparīkṣakaruṁ . nānānayaprauḍhayaugandharasadṛkṣakaruṁ
catuśśīmāparyyaṁtaprāṇigaṇaniṣpādakaruṁ paramata bādhakaruṁ śrīmatsiddhēśvaradēvaśrīpādapadmārādhakaru . mabhēdhyapaṁkabhēdakarumappa śrī
madagrahāraṁ pāvariya nālnūrvvardvijōttamara kālaṁ karcci dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍibiṭṭaṁ . v® . niyataṁ dharmmamanoldu rakṣisidavarggakkuṁ sukhaṁ saṁpadaṁ gaye
gaṁgānadi vāraṇāśi yamunātīraṁ kurukṣētra krita tīrtthadoḷ kōṭiyaṁ saptakōṭiyatīṁdrargge dharāmarargge satataṁ koṭṭudgha
puṇyāspadaṁ . kṣitipāḷaṁ daṇḍanāthaṁ pra sāśvataviṁtī dharmmamaṁ rakṣipudaḷida mahāpātakaṁ bhīkarāṁbhaḥkṛtakuṁbhī
pākamukhyaṁ prabaḷa naraka saptakōṭi nānākrimi prāṇigaḷa gaḍaṇadoḷu nīḍumālāḍutirppar . © ślōka . © svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti vaśuṁdharāṁ śaśṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © Āṁgirasabhāradvājanīkritagōtra nāgavarmmana putraṁ rasacchā sanakri
ti viśvaguṇanidhi sukavi kiriya mūkaṇapaṇḍitara kathitaṁ © rūvāra viśvavidyākōvida kalyāṇatiḷaka nēmōjasutaṁ bhāvi
se kaṇḍarisidanakhiḷāvani pogaḷe śāsanamidu jaḷanidhi caṁdrārkkatāra sale keṟege pāvariyo
doppuvaranantavidyābaḷa śaraṇāgatarakṣareṁduvī
nālnūrvvaru . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
